metadata.description: A collection of plugins and skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: rwsdk-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive RedwoodSDK development toolkit — documentation lookup, frontend debugging, shadcn/ui management, production auditing, and doc sync. Includes skills and slash commands for building full-stack React Server Component apps on Cloudflare Workers.

plugins.name: practical-typography
plugins.description: Helps agents produce well-typeset text by applying key rules from Butterick's Practical Typography. Covers proper punctuation, emphasis, spacing, capitalization, layout, and font guidance.

plugins.name: transformersjs-docs
plugins.description: Guidance for building applications with Transformers.js — run ML models (NLP, vision, audio) directly in the browser or Node.js. Covers React, Next.js, vanilla JS, and Node.js patterns.

plugins.name: wsl-chrome-patch
plugins.description: Patch Claude Code binary to enable the /chrome slash command on WSL2. Fixes 'not supported in WSL' errors and Chrome browser tool connectivity issues.

plugins.name: pretext
plugins.description: Guidance for using @chenglou/pretext — DOM-free multiline text measurement and layout. Covers the two-phase prepare/layout API, font safety, i18n text handling, and integration patterns for React, canvas rendering, and streaming.

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous skill improvement via iterative testing. Run autoresearch on any skill to test it against a yes/no scoring checklist, make one small prompt change per round, keep what works, and revert what doesn't. Based on Andrej Karpathy's autoresearch method.

plugins.name: heerich
plugins.description: Build 3D voxel scenes rendered as SVG using the heerich library. Provides full API documentation and a scene generation command for creating voxel art, architectural models, and isometric graphics.

plugins.name: mapcn-toolkit
plugins.description: Development toolkit for mapcn — interactive React map components built on MapLibre GL, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui. Covers all components (Map, Markers, Popups, Routes, Clusters), advanced usage, and pre-built blocks. Zero-config free tiles.
